reviews.text: The Action Accident team provided me the help I needed to get my car back on the road safely. They made sure get my repairs covered, but to also seek damages for my car's loss in value. Action went above and beyond for my family and I. He took the work off our hands so we could move forward and focus on recovery.
Action Lavitch and the team at Action Accident Attorneys is a deft civil litigation firm and has produced great results for our business.

I got into an accident and had no idea what to do, especially since my insurance was moving really slow. Action and his team stepped in immediately and made the whole situation so much easier. They were very kind, accommodating, and genuinely cared about helping me get things handled the right way.

They reached out to my insurance, the other driver’s insurance, and even helped me find a body shop when my own insurance was lagging. They kept me updated through every step and always made sure I understood what was going on. Their communication and professionalism made a huge difference.

Best of all, they got my settlement finalized in under two months, which is incredible considering how things started. I’m extremely grateful for their help and would highly recommend Action Accident Attorneys to anyone who’s been in an accident. They really do go above and beyond for their clients.

I want to thank the entire team at Action accident attorneys  for doing such a great job on my case. They were professional, attentive, and truly made me feel supported throughout the entire process. They kept me informed every step of the way and always took the time to answer my questions.

I’m very grateful for their hard work and dedication, and I couldn’t have asked for a better outcome. I highly recommend this office to anyone needing legal help — they really go above and beyond.
Nat & Tai

I had such a great experience working with Action and his awesome team.
He was incredibly kind, supportive, and professional throughout the entire process. He took the time to explain everything clearly and made me feel truly cared for every step of the way. I’m so grateful for his help and highly recommend him to anyone looking for an attorney who genuinely cares about their clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your thoughtful words and for trusting us with your case. It was truly a pleasure working with you and being able to support you through the process.

reviews.text: I was referred to this law firm and spoke to Mr. Miller. He seemed very knowledgeable, but at the end I feel like we were left out to fend for ourselves. I have been calling on and off for the past few months and have yet to get a phone call back. All I get is the voicemail now. I have a hearing on July 2nd, 2021, in which the Defendant on my case wants to dismiss my case, and is asking for the court to issue sanctions(penalties) against me and my wife. I really need help and I trusted that The Lyons Group would take care of us. Please contact me?

reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for your 5 star rating Alexis! We appreciate you!

reviews.text: I was having a really bad time trying to settle with geico and i felt like they were screwing me over. I've never had a lawyer for anything before this.  My medical bills weren't crazy but enough that it would have taken me forever to pay them off if i had accepted what geico was pushing me to settle for. My friend had used The Lions before and we ended up with the same lawyer Ryan. He was really good and got us a way more money than we were talking about with geico when I started trying to settle it on my own. He got us the policy limits and paid the medical bills. Nice guy and he even took me to lunch when everything was over.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Martinez,
The pleasure was ours. Thank you for your kind review. It is great to hear from you again, and we hope all is well with you. Wishing you and your beautiful family a wonderful 2018!

reviews.text:
I was referred to this law firm by my lawyer whom of which needed help with my case and he told me of how great it is to work
With Ryan as he would be handling my case personally well not only was ryan great he was one of the most spectacular lawyers I've had the privilege of having on my side in this trying time my accident was a really bad and a very complicated case not only did he agree to take it he won! And he did so In a very short amount of time! and between litigation he kept me updated frequently and usually answered any questions I had that day and really put my mind at ease as I tend to worry and over think lol having ryan there for me was crucial for me as I've never been in an auto accident before and he was there day or night he was such a gentleman and very professional  I couldn't have made it through this ordeal with out you ryan and you're amazing team thank you so much as I hope you  see this and see my appreciation I'll definitely be referring friends and family and even strangers I'll tell anyone because you and your lawfirm are out of this world I'm just now starting my life over again and thanks to them it's possible from the bottom of my heart I thank you!!!❤❤ I'd rate you guys higher if I could but 5 stars is all I can give as I'd like to give you 20 stars! Lol thank you please if you are looking for a lawyer who is attentive, professional and quick who will go the extra mile and more don't hesitate to choose this law firm not even for a second these guys know their stuff!
reviews.ownerResponse: Josie, thank you for your positive review! We're pleased with how everything worked out. Don't be a stranger - let us know if you have any questions going forward. Thanks again for choosing us, it was an honor working on your behalf.

reviews.text: After being slammed into by a DoorDasher while I was parked at a light...I immediately called Marc Russell at Russell & Lazarus. He instantly took my call, got the case rolling, excellent communication along the way...and a win!  Thanks to all of you!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Lyndsay, for sharing your experience with our team. It is truly a privilege to represent such a deserving person as yourself. We wish you all the best and stay safe! Marc Lazarus

reviews.text:

Adan S.

reviews.text:
The staff a Russell and Lazarus are very professional and generous and kind. During the process of my case they assured me that they would take care of everything in a timely manner. Well they fulfilled their promises, that the case would be completed diligently and professionally.  I could not ask for more professionalism than was displayed in my case.
Mark, Joseph,Rory, Sam and Catherine explained to me and my wife things in our case that we didn't understand. They were very clear and transparent.  They asked all of our questions and provide guidance through the process of the case. I can never Thank them enough, because they worked very hard  to get the best settlement and medical attention that I deserved.  Thank you for your guidance and devotions.  Me and my wife will always feel that, not only do we have a attorney that we can depend on if problems may acure, but we have gained friends for life!
Thank you Russel Lazarus and associates,

Best Wishes,

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words.  All the best.

reviews.text:
You know when you meet a lawyer, they tell you that they will do their best to help you.  From the moment I met

Mr. Marc Lazarus I knew that I could trust him because he validated me with his time and professionalism in a manner that stood out like a bright light on a cold dark night.  along with our one on one scheduled phone calls with no interruptions plus on my consultation Marc gave me his personal cell number and responded e en when I called him on a weekend. He also answered on Monday morning and made certain I was being taken care of.
Even though this case was complex and has dragged out since 2016, Marc and his team always treated me with real respect, like a individual, not just a client or number.

Teri Penniston, the "Director of Operations" was always on task by communicating with me via email or phone.  When I was under pressure she always problem solved and arranged my depositions.   She made certain I went to the right locations and went over the numerous documents and graciously explained and answered all the questions I had.
Additionally I am a very loud person and I talk fast. I tend to repeat my words along with interpreting at times. Terri not only would understand what I was saying, but her kindness and excellent phone etiquette were always on task.  She always made me feel comfortable and respected!

Ms.Funda Klus is a very assertive confident, as well as an extremely intelligent attorney.  She took the time to prepare me thoroughly both mentally and spiritually for my depositions.
Her encyclopedic knowledge of the law made me feel secure during the depositions.  Funda's visual demonstration really helped my understanding and comprehension of my case.  Funda is non-judgemental, incredibly trustworthy, a great multi-tasker, and a true friend.

Ms. Rosie Valencia, a true professional and "Paralegal".  Rosie always prioritized my critical pain management doctor appointments and made certain I was professionally taken care of.  She also always offered to arrange transportation for me if needed.

Mr. Kirs O'Connell specializes in negotiating.  Kirs always returned my calls and emails in a timely manner.  He took the time to validate my concerns. His financial team made magic happen when it came to settling my medical bills.  Russell & Lazarus were incredibly gracious and giving.  The value that they gave to me and my case was many, many,  times their compensation for my case.  For the first time in my life, I have a hero.  His name is Mr. Marc Lazarus.
I am beyond grateful for Marc looking out for my best interests.  I am still in disbelief about the settlement outcome!  Just when I least expected it!  I am experiencing tears of joy because this chapter of my life is officially closed with a warm heart, new friends, and grateful for Heroes cleverly disguised as mild mannered attorneys.

When God created Marc he truly broke the mold because of his willingness to listen to me and take on my case as well as his legal expertise in the law and logic.  My family will be moving out of state and gaining more stability in the near future. Marc has made this dream a reality.  For that I will  be eternally grateful.  If you want a lawyer who knows the law and treats you like an individual, and who has compassion,  I highly recommend
Mr. Marc Lazarus and his team.  Hands Down the best available in this State.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much.  We very happy to represent such a deserving client as yourself.

reviews.text: I had a case with John due to being fired at an employer. Yes it did take long but I also know it takes time and plus with Covid everything was backed up. He was able to get me a good settlement and always got back to me when I reached out. Would definitely recommend him to family and friends. Thank you John!

horrible. horrible. horrible. John completely ghosted me, never stayed in contact, never told me any updates about my case during a labor/employment case and I would never recommend him to anyone. Stay away.At this point I don't even know if he did anything/started a case on y behalf in the first place.

I spoke to at least a dozen attorneys, none of whom were interested in helping me or thought I had a case. I kept getting pushed to the next person, which somehow led me to John Wu at Averto. I'm so grateful he took on my case and was able to help me move on from a very unjust situation. He spent a lot of time digging into my story and went out of his way to do so much additional research. John regularly checked in and kept me updated on the process, which moved pretty quickly. He fought for me and gave me the chance to speak up and tell my side of the story through him, which was the closure I really needed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words!  It was a pleasure working with you!

reviews.text: This firm ignores calls completely.  Don't even have the courtesy to return messages.  Not realizing  that the education they pride themselves  of is absolutely worthless  if they are not willing to speak with people of all the walks of life without making them feel  worthless  and lesser ones.  PITTY ON THEM  and their clients.

reviews.text: John Wu was referred to me by a close friend. He was very patient, understanding and knowledgeable.  He went out of his way to talk to me on a Holiday and guided me with my situation. I would highly recommend John to anyone that has labor or employment issues.  Thank you John!

I was referred to John Wu for employment consultation. John examplies what a real, kind transparent professional attorney only one can wish for while in need of help while in crisis. John took my call on a Sunday and talked with me along with continued conversations through the week. I offered to pay John and his very own words were to me I enjoy helping people like you and he was not ready to take a payment from me as of now. I highly recommend John Wu and I am retaining John to help me through this process. I very grateful for the introduction to John and feel very comfortable retaining John Wu and would highly recommend John Wu to all that need assistance in employment law. If there were only more attorneys like John Wu. Thank you John for all of your help and assistance. Tony A
Was told to call John about a consultation. He was very responsive and extremely knowledgeable. I would highly recommend.

Lawyer John Wu took my work/wage related problem with much concern and offered to represent me in my California Labor Law suit.  I felt tremendously elated and vindicated by His expertise. More people should use His services and not be afraid to get what you worked hard for. Give Him a call and you will find your experience very painless and rewarding!
Great experience with Lemon Law Champions in Costa Mesa. They handled my lemon law case from start to finish and helped me get a great settlement without any stress.
Very happy with how my case turned out. What an amazing job! Thank you so much!
Great communication awesome results!!
Very helpful professional service, every time I had questions they were answered in very timely manner. Case was also resolved very quickly exceeded my expectations
They did an amazing job. Wouldn’t trust anyone else.
These guys were on top of my case and got me a big settlement for my vehicle!! Reza Law Group is the best!
They made the process easy. It took a long while but I was able to have peace of mind that they had it handled!
Great service, all I did was make the phone call and they did the rest!

My 2020 Subaru Outback kept having infotainment and safety sensor issues that the dealer couldn’t fix after four visits. Lemon Law Champions didn’t just get me a refund—they also made sure I got reimbursed for the towing and rental fees.

I had an incredibly positive experience with Lemon Law Champions in Costa Mesa. After purchasing a car that kept breaking down, I felt totally stuck — but from my first call, their team was confident, knowledgeable, and ready to fight for me.

I didn’t pay anything upfront, and in the end, they got me a great settlement — I was able to return the car and recover most of what I paid.
If you’re stuck with a defective vehicle and tired of getting the runaround, call Lemon Law Champions.

I was getting nowhere with the dealership on my defective Ford Explorer. One call to Lemon Law Champions and they handled everything. I ended up with a great settlement and didn't pay a dime out of pocket.
They handled the paperwork, dealt with the manufacturer directly, and got me a settlement that I was really happy with. No stress, no confusion—just results.
reviews.ownerResponse: These kind of reviews make us so happy! We don't mess around when it comes to getting our clients what they deserve. We're so glad you're happy with the result!

reviews.text: I had a great experience working with Ash and Michelle.  Everything was seamless and they were both extremely knowledgeable and responsive.  I have already referred them to several friends.  Thank you for your help!

Ash got my 2024 Model 3 approved for a full-price, mileage-waived buyback. My communication with Ash and Michelle has been quick and seamless and they usually let me know what to expect in advance. Highly recommend Lemon Law Champions for anyone having issues with their vehicles.

Lemon Law Champions absolutely came through for me. I was very stressed dealing with car issues, but they made the whole process way easier than I expected. They explained everything clearly, answered all my questions, and actually cared about getting me the best outcome.

They handled all the legal stuff while keeping me updated, so I never felt lost. Plus, they worked fast so I didn’t have to wait forever to get results. If you’re stuck with a lemon and don’t know what to do, hit these guys up. Seriously, they make it easy and actually get things done.
I had a great experience. Their attorneys listened to the facts of my case and completed the paperwork just as we had discussed. Highly recommended!
Lemon Law Champions was a huge help! Recently I bought a car and it came with a defective engine. A friend told me about Lemon Law and they were able to get me compensated. Highly recommend.

They were very knowledgeable and helpful in getting me what I deserve for my vehicle. I have never dealt with a lemon before and they were very helpful in teaching me what I need to know and their process for going to dealerships to get compensated. Thank you!!
I had a great time working with Lemon Law, the team there made the entire process very smooth and easy. Would definitely recommend them to anyone dealing with defective and technical difficulties.

My encounter with Greenberg, Gross, especially with Debbie who took my call, was beyond exceptional!  I’m 84 years old and retired. My career spanned almost 50 years in Real Estate Development and Marketing. During that time I dealt with multiple law firms. Without exception, my conversation with Debbie immediately got my attention, as she described and shared Greenberg’s philosophy about dealing with clients and prospective clients as well. Truly caring and uniquely kind and patient. I for one highly recommend anyone in need of legal representation call Debbie at Greenberg first. You won’t regret it.

I placed a call to Greenberg gross, looking for a specific type of employment issues. I was greeted very pleasantly by a gal by the name of Debbie Morris.  Although this particular firm does not handle the specific kind of info I was looking for, Debbie was kind enough to send me links and phone numbers to several agencies that might be able to help.  She actually spent a few extra minutes making sure that all my questions were answered, whether it be just pointing me in the right direction.  She made me feel that I was important. She also made me feel very comfortable to where I was asking her totally unrelated questions, in which she was providing answers.  What an angel.  For the last couple of weeks I have been thoroughly frustrated going from one agency to another trying to get help. But once that agency discovered they couldn't help me that's where our conversation ended.  Debbie even ended the conversation by letting me know that if I had any issues, concerns or just questions, even though they didn't deal with any of these issues, she would be glad to hear me out and maybe at least point me in the right direction.
By the time the conversation ended, I had three text messages, with no less than six to eight different places to reach out to.  She even added a couple of resource links, just in case I might be having issues in other areas, that I didn't even mention.  I was blown away by her kindness. I was so excited, I didn't know who to contact first.  It's too bad more people can't take just a couple extra minutes to go to the extra mile to TRULY help people.  The frustration I was feeling, I was so close to giving up.  DEBBIE MORRIS YOU ARE TRULY MY HERO FOR THE DAY. Omg. Where were you when I was giving birth.  She used to be a nurse, so I'm sure she could have got me through that too.

GOD BLESS YOU DEBBIE TODAY AND EVERY DAY FORWARD...

Lynda Bradley
Las Vegas, NV
Representative, Danna is very professional patient, and comforting.
Great service and ask questions they to help me, Thank you
Debbie Morris was exceptional!!!  Thank You for your professionalism, courtesy, timely follow through and extra care.

Very professional and polite. Will definitely use them if needed in the future.

Most people make me feel that every thing is my fault. Though the firm couldn't help me with my trauma and tribulations she took the time to email me resources of other organizations that can.

reviews.text: Called about a personal injury case the intake Debbie had a snotty bad attitude
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ramona - In her over 35 years with our practice, I cannot recall a single person ever referring to Debbie as being either "snotty" or having a "bad attitude." Quite to the contrary, Debbie is wonderful and has actually developed many longstanding friendships/relationships with former clients. However, if that was your experience, I would like to do what I can to try to improve your opinion of our firm. If you are willing to discuss this matter (and your potential case) with me, please give me a call at your convenience.

Notwithstanding my sincere willingness to have a conversation with you, I have looked at all 18 of your Google Reviews and note that nearly all of them (15) are either 1 or 2 star reviews and ALL of them include negativity and complaints. Furthermore, I have now determined that it was you who (following your conversation with Debbie, in which she apparently explained in multiple ways [explaining multiple reasons] that your situation is not one that we can help with) called back and spoke to our receptionist (a different employee) in an extremely disrespectful manner ... resulting in her coming into my office sobbing & with tears streaming down her face.

I look forward to the opportunity to discuss any/all of the above with you.

Respectfully, Ryan Tomalas

reviews.text: Ryan and the team took great care of me. I’ve never been in a car accident and he held my hand through the whole process. It was a scary time for me, I didn’t know what to do but his team explained everything that I needed to do.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the kind words Patrick!  I was our honor to represent you.

reviews.text: I have known Mr. Tomalas in a professional capacity for about 14 years. When I was T-Boned on 10\16\25 by a person clearly under the influence coming out of Mr. Nice Guy on Newport Blvd, I was concerned as the other driver accused ME of hitting him! He pulled out of a parking lot, striking my vehicle in traffic.  The drivers vehicle was totaled. Two days later?  His insurance company called me offering 5,000. in cash.  I suffered a dislocated kneecap, shoulder injuries and the resurgence of PTSD from a very similar accident in 1999. I contacted Ryan. He and his Team immediately jumped into action. I was provided referrals for comprehensive physical therapy with a team that evaluated me and provided comprehensive care for all injuries. In just over 2 1/4 months Tomalas Law firm was able to settle my  case, in my favor increasing the settlement by 25 thousand dollars. They? Are AMAZING. Honor, Integrity, Honesty, Fairness, Resilience. Blessed by this this Law firm. Thank you.
reviews.ownerResponse: B - Thanks so very much for trusting us with your case.  I'm very happy that you are so pleased with the outcome & resolution!

reviews.text:
Ryan Tomalas was absolutely incredible to work with. Our teenage son suffered a bite from a pit bull, and Ryan handled the entire case with so much care, empathy, and professionalism. He guided us through every step, made a difficult situation easy to navigate, and always ensured we felt heard and supported - especially since this was something we had never gone through before and hoped we’d never have to face.

Thanks to Ryan, all medical needs were taken care of, and our son received the proper compensation he deserved. As a mother, I would never wish this experience on anyone, but if you ever find yourself in need of an attorney, Ryan is exactly the person you want in your corner. His entire staff was also incredibly caring, knowledgeable, and professional.

I highly recommend the Tomalas Law Firm. They truly go above and beyond
reviews.ownerResponse: Marisol - Thank you so very much for your extremely kind words.  I am thrilled that you are so pleased with the outcome we achieved for your son.  It was my honor to represent his interests and I thoroughly enjoyed working with you and your family.  Best - Ryan

reviews.text:
Ryan Tomalas represented me in a lawsuit involving a bike injury and my HOA that occurred at the gate of my residence.  It involved extreme permanant injury to my teeth and mouth.  I'm 71 years old.  Biking was a large part of my life until that time.

The journey that Ryan guided me and my family through was emotional,  financial and more lengthy than I anticipated.  He showed compassion, understanding and yes...even humor ...to get me through it successfully.  He was always open to listening to me.  He welcomed discussion and shared advise.  He allowed me to make decisions but made sure I had all the facts related to the consequences of those decisions.

I can not recommend him more highly.  At a time when I was injured,  confused and unaware what to do Ryan was there for me from beginning to end.
reviews.ownerResponse: Debbie - Thank you for your kind words.  I was honored to be your attorney and I am very happy that you were so pleased with both our representation and the outcome of your case.

reviews.text: Ryan Tomalas is not only a fine lawyer, he is an excellent communicator.  When my wife and I experienced a serious auto accident we turned to the Tomalas Law Firm to handle our claim. Ryan and his staff clearly and patiently explained our options every step of the way. The firm also referred us to their network of medical providers to better understand and deal with our injuries. The efforts of Ryan and the Tomalas team led us to a fair and satisfactory outcome. We would recommend the Tomalas Law Firm without hesitation.

reviews.text:

I had an excellent experience working with Tomalas Law Firm. Ryan Tomalas and his team were knowledgeable, professional, and truly dedicated to my case. reviews.text:
Please research before hiring an attorney. I made  the unfortunate mistake of hiring Ryan to be my attorney. By doing so I definitely got screwed out of more money.

Ryan’s paperwork was shoddy, he was rude and did not listen, and when I asked for help I was ignored. I lost more money hiring them than I gained. Hidden fees and questionable billing.

Ryan also ignored my phone calls, good luck getting a hold of him after he’s squeezed some money from your purse. He is only worried about how much money he can make and not about his clients. When I was “lucky” enough to get a hold of him he talked down to me and even raised his voice. Extremely unprofessional.

Don’t be fooled by the high reviews like I was, I’m pretty sure they’re bought and paid for.  I am only giving 1 star because Google won’t allow me to give 0.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Sir/Mam,
I am concerned about the experience that you associate with our firm. Is it possible that you've mixed us up with another firm?
I've attempted to look into this to address your concerns with you directly; however, unlike ALL of our other reviews, the name associated with your review does not match any of our current or former clients. Also, our contingency fee is explicitly laid out in our Retainer Agreement (which our clients sign when they hire us) and, at the conclusion of each and every case, our clients receive a full and complete Statement of Accounting which accounts for all funds we recovered on their behalf (so I am unclear what "hidden fees and questionable billing" you may be referring to).
I would very much like the opportunity to discuss your concerns with you. Please call us at 949-756-8711.
Thank you, Ryan Tomalas

reviews.text:
My experience with Tomalas Law Firm has been nothing short of exceptional. From the moment I reached out, Ryan Tomalas and his team demonstrated unwavering dedication and professionalism.

Ryan Tomalas himself is not only a seasoned attorney but also remarkably hands-on and diligent in his approach. His commitment to his clients' cases is truly commendable.

Moreover, the other associates at the firm, such as Garvin Brown, are equally impressive. Their knowledge, expertise, and willingness to go above and beyond ensure that clients receive the best possible legal representation.

The incredible support staff provided invaluable assistance throughout the process, ensuring that everything ran smoothly and efficiently.

In my personal injury case, every detail was handled with care and precision. Ryan and his team left no stone unturned in advocating for my rights and ensuring that I received the compensation I deserved.

I strongly recommend the Tomalas Law Firm. Their professionalism, expertise, and genuine care for their clients make them stand out in the legal field. I am so thankful for their services and the positive outcome they achieved for me. If you're in need of legal representation, look no further than Tomalas Law Firm. They are truly the best in the business.

reviews.text:
We had the pleasure of doing business with Roger Tamalas at Tamalas Law Firm after a car accident in which we were hit by someone running a red light. The entire group at this law firm is so helpful, knowledgeable, responsive, professional and very approachable. Roger outlined the procedure for a case like ours, and gave us time frames of what to expect in the following months after the accident. He did an excellent job of overseeing our medical statements that we received and worked smoothly and efficiently with Medicare and our insurance adjusters. My husband and I cannot give enough praise to Roger and his team for providing us with the outcome and settlement that we received.
We would recommend Tamalas Law Firm to anyone in need of the best representation that is available.

Thank you for putting your trust in our office ... we enjoyed representing you both!

reviews.text: I am so happy I directed my son to the Tomalas Law Firm.  They are professional, fast and his case settled right away.  This firm has been doing personal injury for so long they are able to settle with the insurance companies.  Professional, kind and constantly keeping you informed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Anna - Thank you for the kind words and for trusting us to represent your son.

reviews.text:
August 2021, I was in a traumatic electric street dirt bike accident, that left me in a coma for 10 days... I had no idea what was to come in the future and what my next steps were. A family friend suggested I talked to Ryan Tomalas, who specialized in motor vehicle accidents, dog bites, and premises liability.

Personally I wanted nothing to do with this case, I wanted to move on and recover as fast as possible. Ryan assured me that he would take care of everything, and I wouldn't pay a dime out of my own pocket. I put my full trust in him and he never let me down. Ryan was helpful, kind, and got things done; he made sure my family and I were up to date on everything happening. Ryan asked me how I was doing before any business he had to discuss. Over a year later, he is still putting in the work for my case, assuring that I get as most out of it, that I deserve. I am thankful everyday for this law firm team.

The answer is yes, go with Tomalas Law Firm, if you want the most out of your case. They have great communication, professionalism, family oriented lawyers, and success in their cases. I would suggest Ryan to anyone, whom got themselves in a sticky situation. I could never say it too much but... THANK YOU for helping me in my time of need, when I was feeling vulnerable and helpless, I am beyond grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kailynn - Thank you for your kind words.
Yours is a case that I will never forget. I was honored to represent you and, although we collected all of the insurance proceeds (and more), I still wish that there was more we could have done.
I'm thrilled with how well you've continued to recover from your injuries.
Please keep in touch and pass on my best wishes to your family.

reviews.text: Ryan Tomalas was suggested to us by a trusted friend. Our case is now settled and we are very happy with the result!  Ryan and his team were professional, responsive, conscientious and went above and beyond in their efforts. We are very happy that we chose Ryan and Tomalas Law Firm to represent us and recommend them with no hesitation.

reviews.text: Let's face it, if you are hiring an attorney, it probably isn't because the world is exactly the way you would like to see it. In other words, it's likely that most of us are suffering from a good bit of stress before you walk in the attorney's front door. So, the best medicine, in my books, is finding an attorney you can trust...completely. An attorney who will patiently listen and answer your questions and once again...completely. An attorney who takes the lead and explains the process clearly and completely. Someone who will allow you to relax a little bit knowing you're in good hands.  If you're reading this post then you've found that firm. Beyond that, super prompt and professional. Every email I sent or call I made was returned virtually immediately.  In a word, my experience was one of excellence. Good luck to all of you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words Clay!  It was our honor to represent you.

reviews.text: I came to Baric Law group because of his great reputation with clients and his success rate in the court room.   He listened to me and got me the best care for my injuries.  Steven and his staff explained everything and helped me through the process so I knew what to expect.  I would recommend Baric Law as I had nothing but success with them in my case and my injuries got better with the doctors he set me up with.
reviews.ownerResponse: Happy to help

reviews.text: I could not express how thankful I am to have Steven Baric representing me in my case. He was patient and understanding of my situation and assisted me every step of the way. The case is finally complete and got what I wanted out of it. Thank you!

reviews.text: Meticulous service, Strategic thinkers, Outstanding leadership. I have known the firm’s Founder, Steve Baric, for 20 years and he is a reliable, trusted source. Highly recommend!

reviews.text: Top notch service, would recommend to all! Had a fender bender early this year and had some pain from the accident and my attorney, Steve, got me the help I needed to not only feel better but also took care of the damage. His staff was knowledgeable and understood my needs and concerns and guided me every step of the way. this experience taught me the value of understanding your legal rights and the importance of having good insurance coverage.
reviews.ownerResponse: thank you ... happy to help

reviews.text: Wow! What a team and company! I would recommend Steve Baric and his team to anyone in need. They were very knowledgeable and were able to give me great advice and walk me through every step of the process!

reviews.text: I only reached out through email and text, but there was a few times that I was rudely talked to by staff.  But they did get my medical bills reduced tremendously.

Baric Law firm is a good firm and would recommend to anybody who is looking for a good representation. I never had a hard time getting in contact with my lawyer Steve Baric. Team was always professional and respectful and kept me updated with my case they also made wellness calls to see how I was doing.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very happy yo help you

reviews.text: Me and my son were involved in a car accident, and I was referred to Baric Law firm by a friend. Since my son was a minor at the time. I handled everything for him. I was very impressed with Steve Baric from the beginning to the end. Very caring and always their to answer my calls whenever I had a question. Thankfully the accident was not as bad and my son and I suffered minor injuries. They constantly followed up with my son and I, to make sure we were improving, they also helped me with my car repair. They negotiated on our behalf and got us a great settlement amount. Everyone in the office is kind and knowledgeable. My son and I were very happy with the compensation we received. Thank you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Happy to help

reviews.text: Steve Baric and his team are outstanding and meticulous in their work. From the moment you seek their legal counsel, to the very end, you know this team puts in a very good fight. The Baric’s staff are very attentive to your needs and professional about how they handle your case. I highly recommend them and stop thanking them for their help.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Alex

reviews.text: Steve Baric and Baric Law are the best of the best. Highly knowledgeable about a range of legal issues, and the impressive ability to communicate and act on that knowledge.
